artPrompt: An ornate hero shot of a magnificent many-faceted die fused to a glowing ember-forged hilt, hovering reverently above the feral town square wreathed in sparks and curling smoke, its polished facets catching firelight as a bonfire blazes below. The equipment dominates the frame like a ceremonial weapon, embers and confetti drifting around it. Mono-red palette of flame orange, ember red, and black smoke, exalted ridiculous grandeur, composed wide in a 4:3 landscape frame, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: The Honorable Die of the Realm
subtitle: Roll With Dignity
flavorText: Bring your own dignity. The die is provided.

extras.physicalAction: stand up, hold die aloft, shout FOR THE REALM
